commitMessage:
fix(server): harden Redis usage in user.find/findAny with isRedisReady+safeRedisCommand; guard adminSetup to never crash on Redis/DB errors

- Prevent unhandled promise rejections when Redis is closed/not available
- Use safeRedisCommand for get/set and wrap in try/catch
- adminSetup now wraps findAny in try/catch and bypasses redirect on error

Security/ops: avoids production crashes when Redis is offline; CRM not involved
